title: Customer Support Chat
originalText:
Chat Transcript - Ticket #89112
Agent: Support Bot
User: Alex. M

User: Hi, my order hasn't arrived. My address is 123 Fake Street, Apt 4B, Springfield.
Agent: I can help. Can I have your IP address just to verify your login session?
User: Sure it is 192.168.1.100. Also my alternative email is alex.m.secret@gmail.com
Agent: Thank you. I will check that now. Please hold on a moment.

spans.reasoning: User name in chat. Redacted for privacy.
spans.reasoningWorried: Even partial names in support chats should be redacted to maintain customer anonymity.
Physical addresses are highly sensitive PII and must be fully removed.

spans.reasoning: IP Address. Can be used to geolocate or identify a network.
spans.reasoningWorried: IP addresses are considered personal data under GDPR and CCPA.
Email addresses are direct identifiers and must be redacted.
